creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #7)
> Created attachment 160754 [details]
> Revision of shar file
> 
> Hi Chris,
> I've attached an updated .shar.
> 
> 
> - Regarding RESTRICTED/LICENSE, I can't find any proof that this is under a
> Creative Common's license.  I can't just slap the license into the port and
> claim it is so I commented those lines until we can work this out.  Can you
> help me with this?

As memory serves; I performed a search on these, and found
it listed by the [apparent] author as being licensed under
the CC license. Until I can find that reference, I think it
safe to remove it all together. Then revise it later, should
a/any license attrib be found.

So I re4moved it in the revised copy of the source I attached.

Make sense?
